title: koeleria ligulata
intro: Koeleria ligulata, also known as tufted hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Koeleria ligulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Koeleria ligulata can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to provide various health benefits when consumed.
